what_went_well: All 37 new tests pass cleanly across 3 test files (model-inventory, model-probe, model-routing)
TypeScript compiles with zero errors before and after audit fix
Pre-existing test failures improved: 7 failing files before changes → 5 after (no regressions introduced)
Backwards-compatible blacklist metadata extension preserves legacy entries without breaking existing code
Clean module separation: model-inventory.ts, model-routing.ts, model-probe.ts are well-isolated with clear responsibilities
Proper error classification with 5+ categories and case-insensitive regex matching
TUI integration follows existing codebase patterns (tab cycling, keyboard shortcuts, Ink components)
No hardcoded secrets, tokens, or .env files with real values in any changed file
spawn() used with shell:false — no command injection risk in model probe
path.join() used for config file paths — no path traversal risk
JSON.parse used for config parsing — no code execution risk
Documentation updated in README with operator-facing recovery workflow
OpenSpec specs updated with new requirements (recheck progress feedback, tab alert badge, empty inventory state)
Structured logging (rlog) used for all key operations: probe_success, probe_failed, recheck_success, recheck_failed, blacklist_unblocked
Debug logging with timestamps for all probe operations
what_went_wrong: model-probe.ts had unused 'lower' variable (declared but only used once inconsistently) — FIXED by auditor (removed variable, used regex /i flag consistently)
improvement_suggestions: Consider adding component-level render tests for ModelsTab using ink-testing-library (non-blocking, TUI render testing is complex)

HTTP status code regex patterns (/429/, /503/, /502/, /500/) in classifyProbeError could match false positives in model IDs containing those numbers — consider using word boundary anchors (\b429\b) for stricter matching (non-blocking, low risk since error output context is narrow)
The 27 pre-existing test failures in e2e-pipeline, runner, supervisor, tasks, task-state-v2, actions should be investigated separately (not caused by this change)
deviations_from_spec: Task 4.4 (openspec validate CLI) was not executed — requires openspec CLI in environment (acknowledged by coder, non-blocking)

fixes_applied_detail: model-probe.ts: Removed unused 'lower' variable, replaced lower.includes() calls with regex /i flag for consistency
